title: albuca ovata
intro: Albuca ovata, also known as the white calla lily or cat's tail, is a flowering plant species in the genus Albuca, native to South Africa. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Albuca ovata include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as alleviating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Albuca ovata is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations, including ointments and creams.
